infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Drivers need location access so the fleet and parents can see the bus's live position during a trip.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Drivers need background location access so trip tracking continues if the app isn't in the foreground.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TransTrack to use your location so the fleet and parents can see your bus's live position during a trip.
